GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "We've found the perfect serum for radiant skin", "Not all skincare products are created equal. But if you've been lucky enough to find the perfect regimen for your skin, you'll know that a good serum can be the difference between a dull and glowing complexion. And wouldn't we all rather the latter? No one knows this better than Jocelyn Petroni. Australia's most trusted premium skincare expert, she's always on the lookout for products full of hydrating properties, claiming that serums do the "heavy lifting" no matter your skin's needs. And with years of experience, Petroni knows a truly regenerative potion when she sees one. So when she tried the new Super Potent Serum by Dior, and reported back on just how impressed she was, we knew that we had to try it, too. "A serum should completely soak into the dermis, where it will actively and visibly change the skin," says the Sydney-based therapist, who's known for keeping local fashion and beauty icons like Kate Waterhouse looking dewy. "I love the ultra-refined texture of Dior's Super Potent Serum. It completely soaks in and comforts the skin and has incredible powers of retention, which means that oil and the water has great longevity in the skin." Petroni says that within a week of using the serum, which is part of Dior's pioneering 'Capture Totale' Super Potent Serum, she saw visible results of more radiant skin. And not just a light, surface-layer sheen. The therapist says the energy boost was clear from the inside out. "It's great for all ages and it gives the skin a really efficient energy boost and you can see the results in seven days. It's plumping, smoothing and firming. It ignites radiance," she explains. But while you might expect a product with such immediate results to fade just as fast, Dior's 'Capture Totale' Super Potent Serum has been designed with long-lasting benefits in mind. Packed with 91 percent natural ingredients like the Madagascan Longoza flower, it penetrates deep into the skin cells for a genuine glow. But there's more to bouncy, luminous skin than what meets the eye. Healthy, radiant skin is less likely to age quickly or poorly, and it's also more resistant to changes in the environment and air quality. Products that contain hyaluronic acid are the most effective in keeping your skin hydrated and plumped. And as the name implies, Dior's Super Potent Serum is packed with the good stuff. The brand's skincare scientists have spent 20 years researching and developing the Bio Cellular Technology™ behind the 'Capture Totale' Super Potent Serum; a commitment to quality that's abundantly clear to anyone who's tried the products, Petroni and the range's ambassador, supermodel Gisele Bundchen among them. The iconic French fashion house's mission is to "make women not only more beautiful, but happier, too." This is evident in the Haute Couture and Ready to Wear collections produced by the maison's creative director Maria Grazia Chiuri, but it extends to its beauty department, too. Its Capture Totale Super Potent Serum encapsulates the brand's integrity and commitment to quality. And even though it delivers results astonishingly fast, it's the long-term effects of the entire 'Capture Totale' range that keep us coming back."
